briefdescription.para: Initialize the XV_frmbufwr instance.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance to be initialized.
ConfigPtr
Pointer to the configuration structure.
EffectiveAddr
Physical base address of the device.
This function initializes an XV_frmbufwr instance using the provided configuration structure and base address. It sets up the instance configuration, updates the base address, and marks the instance as ready.

simplesect.para: : XST_SUCCESS on successful initialization.

briefdescription.para: Starts the Frame Buffer Write (frmbufwr) hardware core.

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts the start signal of the frmbufwr core by writing to the control register. It preserves the auto-restart bit if it is set.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.

simplesect.para: The hardware core must be properly initialized and ready before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the Frame Buffer Write (frmbufwr) hardware core has completed its current operation.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the status register of the frmbufwr core and returns the "done" status bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the operation is done, 0 otherwise.
The function asserts that the InstancePtr is not NULL and that the core is ready.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the Frame Buffer Write (frmbufwr) core is idle.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register of the Frame Buffer Write core and returns the status of the idle bit. The core is considered idle if the bit is set.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the core is idle, 0 otherwise.
None.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the XV_frmbufwr instance is ready to accept new input.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register of the frame buffer write core to determine if it is ready for the next operation. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is marked as ready. The function returns a non-zero value if the core is ready for the next input, and zero otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the core is ready for the next input, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Enables auto-restart mode for the Frame Buffer Write (frmbufwr) hardware core.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the auto-restart bit in the control register, allowing the core to automatically restart its operation after completion without requiring software intervention.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.

simplesect.para: The hardware core must be properly initialized and ready before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Disables the auto-restart feature of the frame buffer write core.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr :
Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.
This function disables the auto-restart functionality by writing 0 to the AP_CTRL register of the frame buffer write hardware. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the core is ready before performing the operation.

briefdescription.para: Sets the flush bit in the Frame Buffer Write (frmbufwr) control register.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the flush bit in the AP_CTRL register to trigger a flush operation in the hardware. It reads the current value of the control register, sets the flush bit, and writes the updated value back.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.

simplesect.para: The hardware core must be properly initialized and ready before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the flush done status from the Frame Buffer Write core.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the status register of the Frame Buffer Write hardware instance to determine if the flush operation has completed. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.

simplesect.para: The value of the flush done status bit (non-zero if flush is done, zero otherwise).

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register value for the frame buffer writer's width parameter.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified width value to the hardware register associated with the frame buffer writer instance. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.
The width value to be written to the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the hardware register that specifies the width configuration for the frame buffer write instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.

simplesect.para: The width value read from the hardware register.
The function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the height hardware register for the frame buffer write instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified height value to the hardware register responsible for configuring the frame buffer's height. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready for operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.
The height value to be written to the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_HEIGHT hardware register for the specified Frame Buffer Write (frmbufwr) instance.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.

simplesect.para: The current value of the HWREG_HEIGHT register.
The InstancePtr must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register stride value for the frame buffer write instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified stride value to the hardware register associated with the frame buffer writer. The stride typically represents the number of bytes between the start of one line of pixels and the next in memory.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.
The stride value to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: The InstancePtr must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_STRIDE register from the frame buffer write hardware.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the stride value (in bytes) from the hardware register, which typically represents the number of bytes between the start of one line of pixels and the start of the next line in memory.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance. It must be a valid pointer to an initialized XV_frmbufwr structure.

simplesect.para: The current value of the HWREG_STRIDE register.
The function asserts that InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register for the video format in the frame buffer write instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified video format data to the hardware register associated with the frame buffer writer. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.
The video format data to be written to the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the current hardware register value for the video format.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the HWREG_VIDEO_FORMAT register from the frame buffer write hardware instance specified by InstancePtr.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_VIDEO_FORMAT register.
The function asserts that InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register for the frame buffer virtual address.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes a 64-bit address (Data) to the hardware register associated with the frame buffer. The address is split into two 32-bit values and written to consecutive register addresses.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.
Data
64-bit virtual address to be written to the hardware register.
Preconditions:
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
InstancePtr->IsReady must be set to XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_FRM_BUFFER_V hardware register.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads a 64-bit value from the hardware register associated with frame buffer V. It reads two 32-bit values from consecutive register addresses, combines them into a single 64-bit value, and returns the result.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized.

simplesect.para: The 64-bit value read from the HWREG_FRM_BUFFER_V register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the value of the HWREG_FRM_BUFFER2_V hardware register for the frame buffer writer.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes a 64-bit value to the hardware register associated with frame buffer 2. The value is split into two 32-bit parts and written to consecutive register addresses.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.
Data
64-bit value to be written to the hardware register.
Preconditions:
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
InstancePtr->IsReady must be set to XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the 64-bit value of the HWREG_FRM_BUFFER2_V hardware register.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads two 32-bit registers from the hardware, combines them into a 64-bit value, and returns the result. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the read operations.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.

simplesect.para: The 64-bit value read from the HWREG_FRM_BUFFER2_V register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register for frame buffer 3 (vertical) in the XV_frmbufwr instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes a 64-bit value to the hardware register associated with frame buffer 3's vertical parameter. The value is split into two 32-bit parts and written to consecutive register addresses.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.
Data
64-bit value to be written to the hardware register.
Preconditions:
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
InstancePtr->IsReady must be set to XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the 64-bit value of the HWREG_FRM_BUFFER3_V hardware register.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads two 32-bit registers from the hardware to construct a 64-bit value representing the contents of the HWREG_FRM_BUFFER3_V register. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the read operations.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.

simplesect.para: 64-bit value read from the HWREG_FRM_BUFFER3_V register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_FIELD_ID register from the frame buffer write hardware.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the HWREG_FIELD_ID register from the hardware instance specified by InstancePtr. It asserts that the instance pointer is valid, the instance is ready, and the configuration is set to interlaced mode before performing the register read.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.

simplesect.para: The value read from the HWREG_FIELD_ID register.
The function asserts that the instance is configured for interlaced mode.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register to Force EOF value in the frame buffer write instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the Force EOF data to the hardware register associated with the frame buffer writer. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.
The Force EOF data to be written to the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the current hardware register value for the force EOF.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the HWREG_FORCE_EOF register from the frame buffer write hardware instance specified by InstancePtr.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_FORCE_EOF register.
The function asserts that InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register for the partial frame count in the frame buffer write instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified partial frame count data to the hardware register associated with the frame buffer writer. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.
The partial frame count data to be written to the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the current hardware register value for the partial frame count.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the HWREG_PARTIAL_FRM_CNT register from the frame buffer write hardware instance specified by InstancePtr.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.

simplesect.para: The value of the PARTIAL_FRM_CNT register.
The function asserts that InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Enables the global interrupt for the Frame Buffer Write (frmbufwr) core.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the Global Interrupt Enable (GIE) bit in the control register, allowing the core to generate interrupts. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the core is ready before enabling the interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.

briefdescription.para: XV_frmbufwr_InterruptGlobalDisable - Disables the global interrupt for the frame buffer write core.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.
This function disables the global interrupt enable (GIE) bit in the control register of the frame buffer write hardware. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the operation.

briefdescription.para: Enables specific interrupts for the Frame Buffer Write core.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the bits specified by the Mask parameter in the Interrupt Enable Register (IER) of the Frame Buffer Write hardware instance. Only the interrupts corresponding to the set bits in the Mask will be enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.
Bitmask of interrupts to enable. Each bit corresponds to a specific interrupt.

simplesect.para: The InstancePtr must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Disable specific interrupts for the Frame Buffer Write core.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the interrupts specified by the Mask parameter in the Interrupt Enable Register (IER) of the Frame Buffer Write core.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.
Bitmask of interrupts to disable. Each bit corresponds to a specific interrupt source.

simplesect.para: The function asserts that the InstancePtr is not NULL and that the core is ready before proceeding.

briefdescription.para: Clears specific interrupt(s) for the Frame Buffer Write (frmbufwr) instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified interrupt mask to the Interrupt Status Register (ISR) to clear the corresponding interrupt(s).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.
Bitmask indicating which interrupt(s) to clear.

simplesect.para: The InstancePtr must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the interrupt enable register value for the XV_frmbufwr instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks that the provided instance pointer is valid and that the instance is ready. It then reads and returns the value of the Interrupt Enable Register (IER) for the frame buffer write hardware.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.

simplesect.para: The current value of the Interrupt Enable Register (IER).

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the interrupt status register value for the XV_frmbufwr instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks that the provided instance pointer is valid and that the instance is ready. It then reads and returns the value of the Interrupt Status Register (ISR) for the frame buffer write hardware.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_frmbufwr instance.

simplesect.para: The current value of the Interrupt Status Register (ISR).
